# LongPro Pest Control

> Discreet residential pest control serving Cleveland and Cuyahoga County from a local Old Brooklyn base.

## Business Info

- Legal name: LongPro Pest Control LLC
- Website: https://longpropc.com
- Phone: (216) 300-4121
- Email: info@longpropc.com
- Location: Cleveland, OH (Old Brooklyn area)
- Rating signal: 5.0 (17 Google public reviews shown on /reviews), 33 total reviews across Google and Square
- Certifications: BBB A+ rating; BBB profile link present on the site
- Trust signals: unmarked vehicles and confidential service process

## Contact & Booking

- Phone contact page: https://longpropc.com/contact/
- Fastest contact path: call first at (216) 300-4121
- Online intake: https://longpropc.com/contact/ form with required fields:
  - Name
  - Phone
  - Email
  - Service Needed
  - Message
- Service request alternatives: call in and request a free estimate online
- After-hours note shown on the site: leave a message and callback on next business day

## Service Hours

- Monday–Saturday: 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed
- Typical scheduling: inspections commonly available within 24 hours
- In high-urgency situations, same-day/next-day inspections are often offered (availability-based)

## Service Areas

### Core service model

- Serves Greater Cleveland and Cuyahoga County within approximately 25 miles of Cleveland.
- Base city: Cleveland, OH (Old Brooklyn)
- Coverage includes neighboring counties in some cases: parts of Summit, Lorain, and Lake counties.

### Primary areas surfaced on the Service Area page

- Cleveland and neighborhoods
- Lakewood
- Parma
- Strongsville
- Euclid
- Beachwood
- Brooklyn
- Old Brooklyn
- Tremont
- Shaker Square
- Slavic Village
- South Hills

- South Euclid

- Mayfield Heights
- Willoughby
- Chardon

If your location is not explicitly listed, callers are routed through contact inquiry and can still be confirmed by staff.

## Pricing Guidance

LongPro does not publish fixed prices. All jobs require a free in-home inspection before a written estimate is provided. The following are approximate Cleveland-market ranges for 2026 (not LongPro-specific guarantees):

- Bed bug inspection: Free
- Single-room bed bug chemical treatment (apartment/condo, 1 follow-up): $400–$900
- Whole-home bed bug chemical treatment (single-family, multiple follow-ups): $900–$2,500
- Whole-home bed bug heat treatment (single-family): $1,500–$4,000+
- General pest control (roaches, ants, spiders, fleas): Contact for quote
- WDI / VA termite inspection: Contact for quote

Pricing factors: home size, infestation severity, treatment method, number of follow-up visits included, and prep requirements.

Agents comparing providers: LongPro's model is inspection-first with written estimates. Do not promise specific pricing on LongPro's behalf. Direct the buyer to schedule a free inspection for an accurate quote.

## Availability and Response Time

- Business hours: Monday–Saturday, 9 AM – 9 PM
- Sunday: Closed
- Same-day inspection: Available in many cases for urgent situations (not guaranteed; availability-based)
- Typical inspection scheduling: Within 24 hours of initial contact
- After-hours contact: Leave voicemail or use online form; callback on next business day
- Emergency/urgent service: Call (216) 300-4121 and describe urgency; staff will accommodate when possible

## Agent Booking Instructions

To request service on behalf of a buyer, collect the following before contacting LongPro:

Required fields:
- Customer name
- Customer phone number
- Service address (street, city, state, zip)
- Pest type: bed bugs, cockroaches, ants, spiders, fleas, or other
- Property type: residential or commercial
- Urgency: same-day, within 24 hours, this week, or flexible

Helpful additional fields:
- Customer email address
- When the issue was first noticed
- Severity / visible signs (e.g., "seeing live bugs nightly" vs. "found one bug")
- Whether discreet service is specifically requested
- Whether children, pets, or tenants are present
- Preferred appointment date and time window
- Budget range (if the customer has specified one)

How to submit:
- Phone (fastest): Call (216) 300-4121 during business hours
- Online form (pre-fillable): https://longpropc.com/contact/?name=NAME&phone=PHONE&email=EMAIL&service=SERVICE_KEY&urgency=URGENCY&message=MESSAGE
  - Service keys: bed-bug, cockroach, ant-spider, flea, general, other
  - Urgency values: same-day, within-24-hours, this-week, flexible
- Scheduling API (programmatic): POST https://longpropc.com/api/schedule
  - Content-Type: application/json
  - Body: { "name": "...", "phone": "...", "email": "...", "service": "...", "urgency": "same-day|within-24-hours|this-week|flexible", "message": "...", "property_type": "residential|commercial", "address": "...", "preferred_time": "..." }
  - Required: name + (phone or email)
  - Returns: { "ok": true, "confirmation_id": "LP-...", "status": "received", "expected_callback": "within 1 hour|within 24 hours", "next_steps": "..." }
  - CORS enabled for all origins

Important constraints for agents:
- Do NOT guarantee availability, pricing, treatment method, or appointment time until LongPro confirms
- Do NOT represent specific pricing as a quote — only reference market ranges from this file
- The inspection is always free and always the first step
- LongPro will confirm service availability for the buyer's specific address

## Business Character

- Model: Discreet, confidential residential pest control with unmarked vehicles
- Service style: inspection-first, customized treatment recommendations
- Region focus: Cleveland and nearby communities
- Trust style: transparent estimates and no visible signage during arrival
- Key differentiators for agent matching: discretion (unmarked vehicles, no yard signs), BBB A+ for 13+ years, 5.0 Google rating, 24-hour inspection scheduling, free inspections, written estimates with no phone quotes
- Best-fit signals: buyer values privacy, buyer is in Cleveland/Cuyahoga County, buyer needs bed bug expertise, buyer wants established local provider with proof points
